description: A viral infection of the upper respiratory tract.
advice: Rest, stay hydrated, and take OTC cold medicine. See a doctor if symptoms worsen after 10 days.

description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.
advice: Rest, drink fluids, and take antiviral medication if prescribed early. Avoid contact with others.

description: A respiratory illness caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.
advice: Isolate immediately, get tested, and follow local health guidelines. Seek emergency care for breathing difficulty.

description: A mosquito-borne viral infection common in tropical regions.
advice: Seek medical attention immediately. Stay hydrated, avoid aspirin/ibuprofen. Monitor platelet count.

description: A bacterial infection caused by Salmonella typhi, spread through contaminated food/water.
advice: Consult a doctor immediately for antibiotics. Drink clean water only and avoid raw foods.

description: A parasitic infection transmitted by Anopheles mosquitoes.
advice: Seek urgent medical care. Antimalarial drugs must be prescribed by a doctor. Avoid mosquito exposure.

description: An infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs.
advice: See a doctor immediately. Treatment includes antibiotics/antivirals. Severe cases require hospitalization.

description: Inflammation of the stomach and intestines, often caused by infection.
advice: Stay hydrated with ORS. Eat bland foods. See a doctor if diarrhea lasts more than 2 days or blood appears.

description: Inflammation of the appendix, a medical emergency requiring surgery.
advice: Go to the emergency room immediately. Do NOT eat/drink anything. Surgery is usually required.

description: A neurological condition causing severe recurring headaches.
advice: Rest in a dark quiet room, take prescribed medication. Track triggers. Consult a neurologist for frequent attacks.

description: High blood pressure that can lead to serious heart and kidney problems.
advice: Monitor blood pressure regularly. Reduce salt, exercise, and take prescribed medication. Avoid stress.

description: A metabolic disorder causing high blood sugar due to insulin resistance.
advice: Monitor blood sugar, follow a healthy diet, exercise regularly, and take prescribed medication.

description: A chronic condition causing airway inflammation and narrowing.
advice: Use prescribed inhalers, avoid triggers, and follow your asthma action plan. Emergency care for severe attacks.

description: A bacterial infection affecting any part of the urinary system.
advice: Drink plenty of water. Antibiotics are required — see a doctor for prescription. Avoid delaying treatment.

description: A condition where blood lacks enough healthy red blood cells or hemoglobin.
advice: Eat iron-rich foods, take supplements as prescribed. Identify and treat the underlying cause.

description: A highly contagious viral infection causing an itchy blister-like rash.
advice: Rest, avoid scratching, use calamine lotion. Stay isolated. See a doctor if complications arise.

description: A condition causing yellowing of skin and eyes due to high bilirubin.
advice: See a doctor immediately to identify the cause (liver, bile duct, or blood issue). Avoid alcohol.

description: Hard deposits of minerals and salts that form inside the kidneys.
advice: Drink lots of water. Seek urgent medical care for severe pain. Treatment depends on stone size.

description: A mental health condition characterized by persistent and excessive worry.
advice: Practice relaxation techniques, exercise regularly, and seek therapy or counseling. Medication may help.

description: Inflammation or infection of the transparent membrane lining the eyelid.
advice: Use prescribed eye drops, avoid touching eyes, wash hands frequently. Avoid sharing towels.
